meta_title: For Freelancers: freelance pitching to Solve no project ideas (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to freelance pitching and overcome no project ideas. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Pitching AI Solutions to Solve Project Block
content.seo_description: Overcome the 'no project ideas' trap with high-leverage freelance pitching. Learn how to use Antigravity and Claude Code to build and scale your dev business.
content.answer_block: Stop waiting for inspiration. The secret to endless project ideas is identifying high-friction business processes and pitching AI-driven automation solutions. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for iterative development, you can transform a simple client problem into a high-ticket SaaS micro-tool in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the technical stack, the keyboard, and the ambition, but your mind is a desert of uninspired clones. You are stuck in the 'builder's block' loop, waiting for a spark that never comes while your billable hours slip away into the void of inactivity.

But here is the truth: inspiration is a commodity; execution is the currency. The most successful developers don't wait for 'the next big idea.' They hunt for friction in existing businesses and build the solution before the client even realizes they need it. It is time to stop waiting and start pitching.

steps.title: Audit High-Friction Workflows
steps.description: Identify a repetitive task in your target niche. If a business is using spreadsheets to manage inventory or manual email chains for leads, that is your target.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the following business process [INSERT PROCESS] and identify three specific bottlenecks that can be solved with a custom AI automation tool. Return a feature list for a MVP.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'How can I automate this [INSERT PROCESS] using a lightweight Node.js architecture?'

steps.title: Rapid Prototype with Antigravity
steps.description: Don't build the full app. Build the core value proposition. Use Antigravity to scaffold the essential API layer immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a boilerplate API structure for an AI-powered automation tool that handles [INSERT FEATURE]. Include error handling and authentication.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'npm install antigravity-sdk' && claude /write 'scaffold core API endpoints'

steps.title: Iterative Development with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to refine your logic. Don't write every line of boilerplate; focus on the business logic that provides the actual ROI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this logic to optimize for latency. I need the response time under 500ms for a production environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /fix 'Refactor the database schema to support real-time updates for user dashboard'

steps.title: Draft the 'Value-First' Pitch
steps.description: Your pitch should never mention code. It should focus on 'Hours Saved' and 'Increased Revenue'.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a cold email to a business owner. Focus on the pain points found in step 1. Keep it under 150 words and include a clear call to action for a 10-minute demo.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Review this email pitch for tone and persuasiveness to a non-technical stakeholder'

steps.title: Deployment and Feedback Loop
steps.description: Deploy a staging environment to show the client their solution in action. Live demos close deals faster than any slide deck.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script for Vercel/AWS to launch this MVP for client testing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'deploy to staging environment with environment variables'

pro_tips: Always build the 'admin dashboard' first; clients love seeing their data visualized before the underlying automation is even finished.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your API endpoints; a bug-free demo is the fastest way to build trust.
Never charge for the code; charge for the outcome—if you save them 20 hours a week, price based on their hourly rate.
Keep your tech stack minimal (Next.js + Supabase + Antigravity) to ensure you can maintain the app without a full dev team.
Record a 60-second Loom video of your prototype working; it acts as a 'digital handshake' when you can't get a live call.
resources: The Freelancer's Guide to SaaS: https://indiehackers.com
content.next_steps: Once you have your prototype, reach out to 5 prospects in your chosen niche. Do not wait for perfection—ship the MVP and iterate based on their immediate feedback.
content.conversion_block: Stop dreaming of the perfect project and start building the one that pays. You have the tools, the workflow, and the strategy. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
